name: Tool request

**Tool name**
<!-- e.g., flutter, sdkman, rye -->

**What does it do?**
<!-- Brief description -->

**Update command**
```
tool update
# or
tool self-update
```

**How to detect if installed**
<!-- Binary name on PATH, or registry key, or install path -->

**Requires admin?**
<!-- Yes / No -->

**Install method**
<!-- How is it typically installed? (scoop, winget, pip, standalone installer, etc.) -->
